verdict.summary: Guide is broadly accurate for Anexo H, but it overstates/blurred the 2025 rent cap, misattributes rent and mortgage-interest data to e-Fatura, and misses a few important eligibility caveats.

issues.problem: For IRS 2026 covering 2025 income, the standard maximum deduction for permanent-home rents should not be presented as a vague 700–800 € range. The 800 € figure is generally associated with the later scheduled increase / later tax year, while 2025 income should be stated separately. There are also income-dependent increases under the CIRS formula, so a simple 700–800 range is misleading.
issues.suggestion: Write: "аренда постоянного жилья: 15% rendas; для доходов 2025 стандартный лимит — 700 €, с возможным повышением для более низких rendimentos coletáveis по правилам art. 78.º-E CIRS."
issues.source: Código do IRS, art. 78.º-E; Orçamento do Estado 2024/2025 amendments

issues.current: Imóvel — аренда постоянного жилья: 15% rentas по contrato de arrendamento, максимум 700–800 € (после индексации OE 2024/25).
issues.problem: Same issue as TLDR: the cap is presented as a range instead of the applicable cap for the tax year. For a practical 2026 filing guide, readers need the 2025-income value, not a blended OE 2024/25 range.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: "Imóvel — аренда постоянного жилья: 15% rendas по contrato de arrendamento/recibos comunicados à AT; для доходов 2025 стандартный максимум — 700 €, с возможным повышением для низких доходов по art. 78.º-E CIRS."

issues.current: расходов, которые Finanças подтягивает из e-Fatura: медицина, образование, дома престарелых, аренда жилья и старые ипотечные проценты
issues.problem: Misleading source of data. Health/education/lares often come via e-Fatura, but rents are normally based on registered lease/electronic rent receipts or Modelo 44, and old mortgage interest comes from bank-reported annual information, not e-Fatura.
issues.suggestion: Write: "...из e-Fatura и других данных AT: медицина, образование и lares через e-Fatura; аренда — через contrato/recibos de renda или Modelo 44; старые ипотечные проценты — через данные банка."
issues.source: Portal das Finanças — e-Fatura; Código do IRS, art. 78.º-E

issues.current: Проверьте e-Fatura: NIF должен быть указан в счёте в момент покупки или оплаты.
issues.problem: Correct for many invoices, but the guide is about categories including rent and mortgage interest, where e-Fatura is not the relevant mechanism. As written, it can confuse readers into searching for rent/mortgage items in e-Fatura.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Проверьте e-Fatura для faturas de saúde/educação/lares; отдельно проверьте recibos/contrato de arrendamento и справку банка по juros."
issues.source: Portal das Finanças — e-Fatura; Código do IRS, art. 78.º-E

issues.current: Lares: 25% расходов с lares, apoio domiciliário и аналогичными учреждениями, максимум 403,75 €.
issues.problem: The amount is fine, but the eligibility caveat is missing. Deduction for lares can cover the taxpayer/spouse and also ascendants/collaterals up to the third degree, but relatives are subject to conditions, notably income not exceeding the minimum monthly wage. Without this, readers may assume any care-home expense for any relative qualifies.
issues.suggestion: Add: "Для родственников применяются условия: обычно ascendente/colateral até 3.º grau, если их доход не превышает RMMG/SMN; проверьте NIF и eligibility учреждения."

issues.current: Estudante deslocado: аренда жилья студентом вдали от постоянного адреса может входить в educação при правильном contrato de arrendamento и регистрации в Portal das Finanças; общий лимит educação может увеличиваться по специальным правилам.
issues.problem: The statement is directionally correct but too vague on key conditions: displaced-student rent has age/distance/formal registration requirements and a specific sub-limit. This is a common audit/error area.
issues.suggestion: Add the caveat: "Обычно нужны estudante até 25 anos, учебное заведение более чем 50 км от permanent household residence, contrato/recibos correctly identified as estudante deslocado in Portal das Finanças, and the student-rent sub-limit applies."

issues.current: Проверьте composição do agregado familiar в Portal das Finanças до подачи декларации.
issues.problem: Helpful but incomplete: the annual communication of household composition normally has its own February deadline; if missed, the taxpayer may still be able to correct dependants in the IRS declaration, but automatic pre-filled data may be affected.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Проверьте/сообщите agregado familiar в Portal das Finanças в ежегодный срок AT, обычно до середины февраля; если пропустили, проверьте и исправьте dependentes в самой декларации IRS."
issues.source: Portal das Finanças — Comunicação do agregado familiar

issues.problem: This Portal das Finanças path looks plausible but should be rechecked: AT has reorganised several help pages, and similar pages often sit under apoio_contribuinte rather than apoio_ao_contribuinte. If the URL 404s, readers lose the primary source.
issues.suggestion: Verify the URL live and, if broken, replace with the current Portal das Finanças page for IRS > Deduções à coleta or link to the current AT folheto and CIRS articles instead.

issues.problem: Same risk as above: the URL may be an old/reorganised AT help-page path. The content should not rely on a possibly stale deep link without confirming it still resolves.
issues.suggestion: Verify the URL and replace with the current AT page if needed.

missing_topics: Mention that Anexo H also covers other common deductions/benefits beyond saúde/educação/lares/imóvel, such as despesas gerais familiares, IVA pela exigência de fatura, pensões de alimentos, PPR and donations, even if only to say they are outside this guide.
Add the exact low-income rent-deduction uplift rule or at least say that the standard rent cap is not the absolute maximum for all households because art. 78.º-E has income-dependent increases.
Add a short note that manually overriding pre-filled Anexo H values can disable/replace AT-calculated values for that category and increases audit risk.
